user.title: Configure TOG Rating
user.description: Choose the indoor temperature sensor and weather entity used to generate child clothing and TOG guidance. The outdoor temperature sensor is optional, and current outdoor temperature can fall back to the weather entity.

error.same_temperature_entity: Indoor and outdoor temperature sensors must be different.
error.sensor_unavailable: One of the selected temperature sensors is unavailable.
error.invalid_temperature_sensor: Temperature sensors must expose numeric values in °C or °F.
error.weather_unavailable: The selected weather entity is unavailable.
error.invalid_weather_temperature: When no outdoor sensor is selected, the weather entity must expose a numeric current temperature in °C or °F.
error.invalid_outdoor_weight: Outdoor temperature weight must be between 0% and 100%.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one TOG Rating configuration is supported right now.

init.title: TOG Rating options
init.description: Adjust the outdoor temperature source and how much influence outdoor temperature has on the recommendation.

error.same_temperature_entity: Indoor and outdoor temperature sensors must be different.

error.invalid_outdoor_weight: Outdoor temperature weight must be between 0% and 100%.
